news_data.title: Wirecard Admits €1.9B in Cash Likely Never Existed
news_data.snippet: Auditor EY could not confirm existence of €1.9B in trust accounts, exposing years of accounting fraud.

news_data.title: Wirecard CEO Markus Braun Arrested on Fraud Charges
news_data.snippet: Former CEO arrested on suspicion of market manipulation and accounting fraud spanning multiple years.

news_data.title: Wirecard Files for Insolvency After Fraud Revelation
news_data.snippet: Once a DAX 30 member valued at €24B, Wirecard collapsed within days of admitting fabricated accounts.

news_data.title: COO Jan Marsalek Vanishes Amid Wirecard Investigation
news_data.snippet: Interpol issues red notice for fugitive COO believed to have orchestrated the fraud from the Philippines.

news_data.title: German Regulator BaFin Faces Scrutiny Over Wirecard Failure
news_data.snippet: Parliamentary inquiry finds BaFin shielded Wirecard and attacked short sellers instead of investigating fraud.

social_data.title: Wirecard Was a Complete Fabrication
social_data.snippet: Half the revenue was fake, partner companies didn't exist, and regulators went after the journalists. Unreal.

social_data.title: Lost My Savings in Wirecard Stock
social_data.snippet: Held since 2018 believing in the fintech story. Stock went from €140 to €0.50. Devastating.

social_data.title: EY Audit Failure Discussion
social_data.snippet: EY signed off on Wirecard's accounts for over a decade without verifying cash balances. How is this possible?

review_data.title: Wirecard Employee Review — Finance
review_data.snippet: Found out our company was a fraud from the news. Many of us had no idea. Career destroyed overnight.

review_data.title: Wirecard Employee Review — Technology
review_data.snippet: The payments tech was real but layered on top of fabricated revenue. Mass layoffs after insolvency.
